title: Peppery Vietnamese Coriander Stir-fry
description: A dense and indulgent peppery dish featuring ground coriander, perfectly suited for a low-calorie-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: tapioca starch
ingredients.amount: 1 tablespoon, mixed with water to form a slurry

instructions: Heat sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add ground coriander and chili flakes, cooking for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Stir in minced ginger and garlic; cook for an additional minute.
Add red bell pepper, tomato sauce, lime juice, and salt. Stir well to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for about 5 minutes.
Thicken with tapioca starch slurry by gradually adding it into the pan while constantly stirring to avoid lumps.
Serve hot as an indulgent side dish or appetizer.
